results.title: Medical expert and breast cancer survivor reflects on the lifesaving impact of breast cancer screening
results.description: In Colorado, and even more so in El Paso County, the breast cancer screening rate is below the national average. What you need to know.

results.title: As cyclosporiasis cases rise, consumers are left guessing which foods to avoid
results.description: Officials are still searching for the source of the outbreak, prompting consumers to seek advice on social media about which foods to avoid.

results.title: How Yankees' Cam Schlittler is soaking in All-Star Game experience
results.description: At his first All-Star Game, Yankees right-hander Cam Schlittler has enjoyed the unique Philly atmosphere and meeting some legendary AL teammates.
